description: COMP-1 IEEE 754 single-precision: 0.1 + 0.2 rounding through float truncation
notes: IEEE 754 single: 0.1 stores as ~0.10000000149, 0.2 as ~0.20000000298. Sum ~0.30000000447, stored through IEEE as ~0.30000001192. Quantized to PIC 9V99 (ROUND_DOWN) = 0.30. Engine uses PIC clause with COMP-1 (non-standard but functional). IBM COMP-1 has no PIC — uses raw float.
